works.t: Cabin in the Sky: Happiness is a Thing Called Joe

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: The director of the orchestra was Paul Baron who was a well-known conductor and arranger also. When I told him the number was not in the key I was used to playing it in, he told the musicians what key they should transpose it to, and that was all.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Hall
about_quotes.evidence: Paul Baron led the band... I came to seek this job... this led up to my getting a job with -- Paul Baron.

about_quotes.speaker: Roy Eldridge
about_quotes.evidence: I met Paul Baron in Rome. He was conducting a symphony in Rome, you know.
